ground_truth.title: Buy Now Pay Later Regulatory Frameworks: Consumer Protection and Credit Risk
ground_truth.abstract: We compare BNPL regulatory approaches across the US, EU, and Australia, analyze default risk patterns using transaction-level data, and assess systemic risk from BNPL integration with traditional credit markets.
